message:
perf: add SIMD vectorization to @logic_table vector ops

- Add 4-element @Vector SIMD to dot_product, cosine_similarity, l2_distance
- Handles both slices and arrays via @typeInfo switch
- Processes 4 elements per iteration with @reduce(.Add, ...)
- Fallback scalar loop for remainder elements

Results: 12.7x speedup on 384-dim vectors (121ms -> 9.6ms)
